intro:
The last train is bound for nowhere — and it never stops.
The rails cut through darkness, fear, and the unknown.
Survive the ride… no matter what’s waiting ahead.
description:
Rails of Dead is a thrilling zombie survival shooter set aboard a moving train filled with danger, mystery, and the undead. Fight, explore, and survive in this action-packed horror experience!

SURVIVE USING GUNS, STRATEGY & SKILL
Collect and upgrade a wide range of weapons
Use medkits, traps, and power-ups to stay alive

DISCOVER THE MYSTERY
Piece together the story by exploring notes, finding clues, and surviving long enough to uncover the truth.

FEATURES:
Fast-paced zombie shooting gameplay
Atmospheric horror setting on a haunted train
Smooth controls and controller support
Perfect for fans of action, horror, and survival games
